zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wadhams III於1610年9月25日在英國薩默塞特韋斯特 哈契受洗時，他的父親John Wadham Jr26歲，母親Clara23歲。他於大約1653年與Susannah在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1676年12月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年66歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wadhams III于1610年9月25日在英国薩默塞特韋斯特 哈契受洗时，他的父亲John Wadham Jr26岁，母亲Clara23岁。他于大约1653年与Susannah在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1676年12月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年66岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Wadhams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wadhams III was christened on 25 September 1610, in West Hatch, Somerset, England, his father, John Wadham Jr, was 26 and his mother, Clara, was 23. He married Susannah about 1653, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 16 December 1676, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 66, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wadhams III a été baptisé le 25 septembre 1610, à West Hatch, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Wadham Jr, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Clara, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Susannah environ 1653, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 16 décembre 1676, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wadhams IIIが1610年9月25日にイギリスソメルセトウエスト ハトチで洗礼を受けた時，父John Wadham Jrは26歳，母Claraは23歳であった。約1653年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでSusannahと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1676年12月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで66歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford: 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: John Wadhams III(이)가 1610년 9월 25일 영국 서머세트 웨스트 해트치에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wadham Jr(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Clara(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1653년 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Susannah(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1676년 12월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wadhams III foi batizado em 25 de setembro de 1610, em West Hatch, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wadham Jr, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Clara, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Susannah aproximadamente 1653, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de dezembro de 1676, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wadhams III был крещен 25 сентября 1610 г. в местности вест хач, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wadham Jr было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Clara, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Susannah около 1653 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 16 декабря 1676 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

Se casó con Susannah aproximadamente 1653, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 16 de diciembre de 1676, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
